seo.title: About RECPL
seo.description: Learn about Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd., a leading NDT, TPI, structural audit, and engineering consultancy firm in Bhubaneswar, Odisha.

hero.title: About Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd.

intro.title: Who We Are
paragraphs: Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd. (RECPL) is a professionally managed engineering consultancy and industrial inspection company headquartered in Bhubaneswar, Odisha. Founded with a mission to deliver reliable, accurate, and cost-effective engineering solutions, RECPL has established itself as a trusted name in Non-Destructive Testing (NDT), Third Party Inspection (TPI), Structural Stability Audit, Engineering Design & Consultancy, and the supply of material testing instruments.

Our operations are led by Er. Debasish Mishra and supported by Dr. Sarada Prasad Parida (Ph.D., VSSUT Burla), who serves as Expert and Project Head. This blend of industry experience and academic rigour enables RECPL to deliver inspection and consultancy services that meet stringent national and international standards.

RECPL is recognised as a Competent Person under the Factory Act 1948, Sections 28, 29, 31 & Rule 3A, authorising us to inspect and certify boilers, pressure vessels, lifting equipment, and other factory machinery. Our NDT professionals are certified to ASNT SNT-TC-1A Level II standards and our lead auditors carry ISO 18001 accreditation.

image.alt: RECPL engineers inspecting industrial structural systems

strengths.title: Integrated Technical Support, Not Standalone Testing
strengths.description: RECPL does not merely test — we consult, design, inspect, and supply.

items.title: Integrated Approach
items.description: Engineering design, inspection, testing, and equipment supply coordinated through one technical partner.

items.title: Advanced Testing Methods
items.description: Ultrasonic, eddy current, magnetic particle, and dye penetrant testing aligned to industrial field conditions.

items.title: Statutory Inspection Capability
items.description: Authorised TPI for boilers, pressure vessels, lifting equipment, and factory machinery under the Factory Act 1948.

items.title: Design & Analysis Depth
items.description: Detailed engineering drawings, finite element analysis, and structural assessment for complex industrial structures.

items.title: One-Stop Supply Support
items.description: Material testing instruments, surveying equipment, soil testing devices, and laboratory apparatus from trusted manufacturers.

items.title: Our Mission
items.description: To provide world-class engineering consultancy, inspection, and testing services that help industries maintain the highest standards of safety, quality, and regulatory compliance while delivering tangible value through technical expertise and innovation.

items.title: Our Vision
items.description: To be recognised as India’s most trusted and technically advanced engineering consultancy firm, setting benchmarks in NDT, TPI, structural audit, and material testing services across diverse industrial sectors.

items.title: Core Values
items.description: Integrity, precision, safety-first thinking, innovation, and client-centric execution guide every RECPL engagement.

leadership.title: Meet the Experts Behind RECPL
leadership.description: RECPL’s team brings together experience across mechanical engineering, structural design, NDT, quality assurance, and academic research.

members.name: Er. Debasish Mishra
members.description: Co-founder and Director of RECPL with deep expertise in industrial inspection, NDT, and factory safety compliance. Leads strategic direction and client relationships and holds qualifications as a Competent Person under the Factory Act 1948 and an ISO 18001 Lead Auditor.

members.name: Dr. Sarada Prasad Parida
members.description: Ph.D. in Engineering from VSSUT Burla with an M.Tech in Mechanical System Design & Dynamics, 36 published journal articles, 480+ citations, multiple patents, and extensive industrial consultancy experience in structural strength assessment, steel design, and RCC audits.

members.name: Er. Rajat Kumar Panda
members.description: M.Tech in Heat Power Engineering and experienced CAD/CAM design engineer with proficiency in AutoCAD, UG-NX, CATIA, and ANSYS, supporting design development and site execution.

members.name: Er. Amit Rout
members.description: ASNT SNT-TC-1A certified in Ultrasonic Testing and Eddy Current Testing with multi-industry experience in quality control, fabrication inspection, defect analysis, and production supervision.

members.name: Additional Positions
members.description: Team expansion roles reserved for future appointments as RECPL grows its laboratory and client-support capabilities.
